# thoth_siem_settings (Resource)

Manages tenant SIEM integration settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `siem_provider` (String) SIEM provider slug.
- `siem_webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Enable SIEM webhook delivery.
- `siem_webhook_provider` (String) SIEM webhook provider slug.
- `siem_webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) SIEM webhook signing secret.
- `siem_webhook_url` (String) SIEM webhook URL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier (tenant ID).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID resolved from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by GovAPI.
